==================================================
DNorm and FNorm Vector Normalization Test Program
==================================================

TEST 1: {1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0}
---------
Double Before: 1.000000000000000, 2.000000000000000, 3.000000000000000, 4.000000000000000
Sum before: 10.000000000000000
DNorm result: 1
Double After : 0.100000000000000, 0.200000000000000, 0.300000000000000, 0.400000000000000
Sum after: 1.000000000000000

Float Before : 1.00000000, 2.00000000, 3.00000000, 4.00000000
Sum before: 10.00000000
FNorm result: 1
Float After  : 0.10000000, 0.20000000, 0.30000001, 0.40000001
Sum after: 1.00000000

TEST 2: {0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.4}
---------
Double Before: 0.100000000000000, 0.200000000000000, 0.300000000000000, 0.400000000000000
Sum before: 1.000000000000000
DNorm result: 1
Double After : 0.100000000000000, 0.200000000000000, 0.300000000000000, 0.400000000000000
Sum after: 1.000000000000000

Float Before : 0.10000000, 0.20000000, 0.30000001, 0.40000001
Sum before: 1.00000000
FNorm result: 1
Float After  : 0.10000000, 0.20000000, 0.30000001, 0.40000001
Sum after: 1.00000000

TEST 3: {10.0, 20.0, 30.0, 40.0}
---------
Double Before: 10.000000000000000, 20.000000000000000, 30.000000000000000, 40.000000000000000
Sum before: 100.000000000000000
DNorm result: 1
Double After : 0.100000000000000, 0.200000000000000, 0.300000000000000, 0.400000000000000
Sum after: 1.000000000000000

Float Before : 10.00000000, 20.00000000, 30.00000000, 40.00000000
Sum before: 100.00000000
FNorm result: 1
Float After  : 0.10000000, 0.20000000, 0.30000001, 0.40000001
Sum after: 1.00000000

TEST 4: {0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0} - Edge Case (All Zeros)
---------
Double Before: 0.000000000000000, 0.000000000000000, 0.000000000000000, 0.000000000000000
Sum before: 0.000000000000000
DNorm result: 0 (0 = division by zero error)
Double After : 0.000000000000000, 0.000000000000000, 0.000000000000000, 0.000000000000000
Sum after: 0.000000000000000

Float Before : 0.00000000, 0.00000000, 0.00000000, 0.00000000
Sum before: 0.00000000
FNorm result: 0 (0 = division by zero error)
Float After  : 0.00000000, 0.00000000, 0.00000000, 0.00000000
Sum after: 0.00000000

==================================================
All tests completed.
==================================================
